channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: The $145 billion math: Why bitcoin’s quantum threat is manageable, not existential
item.description: Quantum fears focus on vulnerable early wallets, but market data suggests even a worst case sell-off would be large, not catastrophic.

item.title: Ripple-linked XRP slips amid bitcoin profit-taking, ETF delay
item.description: Token falls 2.5% after rejection near $1.44 as leveraged ETF launch pushback adds to mixed sentiment.

item.title: Google Takes Aim at Nvidia With New Tensor Chips to Power AI Boom
item.description: Google’s new processors target massive model training and the emerging AI agent economy, offering distinct builds for both needs.

item.title: Kelp DAO exploiter launders nearly all 75,700 in stolen ETH through THORchain
item.description: The wallet linked to the Kelp DAO exploit appears to have laundered most of the $175 million worth of stolen Ether, while another $71 million remains frozen by Arbitrum’s security council.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) drops 3.9%, leading index lower
item.description: Ethereum (ETH), down 2.9% since Wednesday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: More than 90% of Web3 games failed after $15 billion boom as gamers never showed up: Caladan
item.description: Gaming took 63% of all Web3 venture funding in 2022, but by 2025 its share had fallen to single digits as capital rotated into AI, real-world assets and layer-2 infrastructure.

item.title: 'Excellent Window' for Strategic Accumulation as Bitcoin Risk Indicator Flips Bullish
item.description: With Bitcoin topping $79K Wednesday, a "cleared risk landscape" hints at a potential extension of its ongoing rally.

item.title: Andre Cronje’s Flying Tulip adds withdrawal circuit breaker as DeFi exploits mount
item.description: Flying Tulip said its withdrawal safeguard is designed to fail open, while a status page lets users monitor the system in real time.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Clears $79,000, Then Reverses
item.description: Justin Sun is suing Trump’s World Liberty Financial, and the U.S. government is now openly running a Bitcoin node.

item.title: BlackRock drives 7-day Bitcoin ETF inflow streak as BTC nears $80,000
item.description: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a seven-day inflow streak totaling $1.9 billion, surpassing their March run over a similar period.

item.title: $30 Billion and Counting: How Tokenized RWAs Are Becoming a Mainstream Investment for Institutional Capital
item.description: This blog is a preview of our forthcoming report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of… The post $30 Billion and Counting: How Tokenized RWAs Are Becoming a Mainstream Investment for Institutional Capital app…

item.title: Anthropic Using ‘Fear-Based Marketing’ to Promote Claude Mythos: Sam Altman
item.description: The OpenAI chief said warnings about rival Anthropic’s AI model may be exaggerated, as its cybersecurity capabilities draw scrutiny.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs flows are (to quote Steve Winwood) back in the high life.. every single rolling period for we track is now positive, haven't seen that in months (IBIT's $3b is in Top 1% of all ETFs). Still tho, need a couple bil more to get back to breaking new ground i - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1KVmRPcFBYNVdzbGpLamJDY3U5b20tdXM0eE5pb3FuX1FKWmxjR2k4bmQ1UDlKSmUxdTVGWHBJY2tfaHl0N2hDd0hGZGxpczZrV3VIaXFqMjgwT1FFczBRQ3E4N00?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin ETFs flows are (to quot…

item.title: U.S. military runs Bitcoin node, sees crypto as power projection versus China
item.description: Admiral Samuel Paparo, head of US Indo-Pacific Command, told two congressional panels this week that the military is running a live Bitcoin node for cybersecurity testing and views the protocol as a tool of national power in competition wi…

item.title: MetaMask co-founder Dan Finlay leaves Consensys after 10 years
item.description: MetaMask co-founder Dan Finlay is stepping down from ConsenSys citing burnout, as long-time crypto figures such as Bitcoin advocate Preston Pysh also pull back from public roles.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried withdraws retrial motion. He believes he would not get a fair trial.
item.description: The founder of the collapsed crypto exchange FTX said he might file for a retrial after a decision on his appeal is ruled upon.

item.title: Bitcoin buyers show ‘renewed conviction’ with BTC price push toward $79K
item.description: Bitcoin reached multi-month highs at $79,000 as bulls regained control and exchange reserves tightened, signaling buyers returning and reduced sell pressure.

item.title: Bitcoin's bullish momentum runs into Pentagon-backed inflation warning
item.description: What you need to know for April 23, 2026

item.title: Blockchain Capital Seeks $700M for Two New Crypto Funds
item.description: The venture capital firm aims to close the fundraising within five to six months, and is already deploying some of the new capital.

item.title: Bitcoin slips from near $80,000 as oil price increase weighs on risk assets
item.description: Bitcoin dips after testing $80,000 as oil surges and traders stay bearish, even though a breakout hints the rally could accelerate on short squeezes.

item.title: More than 100 crypto firms urge Senate to move on U.S. market structure bill
item.description: Key priorities include defining clear SEC and CFTC oversight roles, protecting non-custodial developers, simplifying disclosure rules, and avoiding a patchwork of state laws.

item.title: The DAT collapse: Pantera wants Satsuma to dump its bitcoin as shares crash 99%
item.description: Pantera Capital is urging London-listed Satsuma Technology to liquidate its remaining bitcoin holdings and return cash to shareholders.

item.title: Coinbase backer Blockchain Capital hunts $700 million for new funds
item.description: The San Francisco-based firm is raising for its seventh early-stage fund and second growth fund, which are expected to be completed in the next five to six months.

item.title: Pantera Urges LSE-listed Bitcoin Treasury Company Satsuma to Sell $50 Million in Bitcoin According to Bloomberg, sources revealed that crypto venture fund Pantera Capital is urging London-listed Satsuma Technology Plc to sell its remaining $50 million wo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9iT2RUUmJjREpuT25QeDB2ajNCNl9qQVBSdVJQeWdPYVFldEljc0JuVHdVSTR1UzRwOFAyOThxNFJQRVVDOU00LTFmWFNLeHFpUEhYUkxrVXdKUmF5WVdIVWRpbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Pantera Urges LSE-listed Bitcoin…

item.title: Polymarket traders win $37K after Paris weather data glitch, raising suspicion
item.description: Ruben Hallali, a meteorologist, told French media outlet BFMTV the sudden temperature fluctuation recorded at a weather station at the Charles de Gaulle Airport was unlikely to be a natural event.

item.title: OpenAI appears to be poaching Coinbase’s marketing team
item.description: Six Coinbase senior marketing executives, including the exchange's former chief marketing officer, have jumped to OpenAI in the past year and a half.

item.title: Crypto sentiment index soars to a 3-month high as Bitcoin holds $77K
item.description: Despite the rise, the Crypto Fear & Greed Index score remains stuck in the “Fear” zone, where it has been since Jan. 18.

item.title: Apple fixes bug that allowed FBI to read deleted Signal messages
item.description: FBI used the flaw to extract readable Signal messages from an iPhone's notification database even after the app was deleted.

item.title: Blockchain Capital is raising $700M for 2 new funds: Report
item.description: The new funding rounds are expected to be completed in the next six months, but the firm has already begun deploying some of the new capital, according to a person familiar with the matter.

item.title: Bitcoin's bull score index just left bear territory. There's a warning attached.
item.description: The index has returned to neutral territory, a rare milestone that has historically marked market turning points, but not always correctly.

item.title: FTX sold its Cursor stake for $200,000 in 2023. It would be worth $3 billion today
item.description: SpaceX's agreement to acquire AI coding startup Cursor at a $60 billion valuation has retroactively turned a routine bankruptcy asset sale by FTX's estate into one of the largest missed recoveries in crypto history.

item.title: Ether taker volume rises by 72% as traders target ETH liquidity gap at $2.6K
item.description: ETH derivatives show strong buyer dominance, leading traders to target $2,500 to $2,600 as the next crucial rally.

item.title: Market maker GSR launches first ETF tracking Bitcoin, Ether and Solana
item.description: The GSR Crypto Core3 ETF is GSR's first crypto exchange-traded product, giving investors access to the top three largest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.

item.title: LATEST: 🚨 Lazarus Group is targeting crypto executives with new macOS malware spread through fake meeting links, according to CertiK. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9LTUtWbVNrTTg3ZlZxMXl2Ny1tbUZCdUpQQXFRSVdzTHpUaExpQWV3S2NCaGw4ckt1VFVPZy1DMVpfX2p0R3FEVmtSa0dOSldfRDR6WkQxRmk4TDVTaFZxSFFhRE0?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 🚨 Lazarus Group is tar…

item.title: Phishing, deepfakes, supply chain attacks to fuel 2026's biggest crypto hacks: CertiK
item.description: CertiK has urged crypto users not to overlook basic security practices as major crypto hacks spiked in April.

item.title: Cardano builder seeks smaller funding slice of $46.8 million for scaling and Bitcoin DeFi
item.description: The engineering organization behind Cardano submitted nine proposals totaling $46.8 million for the 2026 voting cycle, down from $97.5 million last year.

item.title: Bitcoin loses grip near $80,000 as ETH, SOL, DOGE fade on profit-taking
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $77,794 on Thursday morning, up 0.4% over 24 hours but well off the $79,388 high hit Wednesday evening, with ether, XRP and Solana all closing red.

item.title: Bitcoin tends to be closer to a bottom when it looks least attractive - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBxUWhvZjd0cE12cVd1Z1VlN3FmcDY3clpzbW1hSXR0MjZiaFhuVVNLOWJZZUllaTRPN3BRZXBFYl9pSTVkdFR4a05mQmwxOGFaT3hJdjBHdDdZMjNucFdDd0V3?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin tends to be closer to a bo…

item.title: World Liberty accuses Justin Sun of 'misconduct' in response to Tron founder's defamation claims
item.description: Co-founder Eric Trump went further, saying the only thing more 'ridiculous' than Sun's lawsuit is a $6 million banana duct-taped to a wall.

item.title: Kalshi bans 3 US politicians for betting on their own election races
item.description: Matt Klein, a sitting member of the Minnesota State Senate, said he made a bet out of curiosity, while Mark Moran claimed he wanted to see how Kalshi responded to insider trading activity.

item.title: 🇺🇸 LATEST: Senator Bernie Moreno expects crypto market structure legislation to pass by the end of May. He warned the Clarity Act missing the deadline could shelve it indefinitely, per Eleanor Terrett. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5yOGcyVmpmb1V0TVpsZklmamVvVlJCSHVySWZuNEZkcVQxVmw5b2s0ZDY2cHE5eGdZdm53eC16SFlpZElTYzZPOHNLeTZDTW1Hc3RoOEhrc0J4TTc2TXl4aWF2Mkc?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 LATEST: Senator Bernie Mor…

item.title: New York, Illinois sign EOs banning state employees from prediction markets
item.description: New York Governor Kathy Hochul criticized the Trump administration for not implementing any “meaningful ethical standards” to curb insider trading in prediction markets.

item.title: ⚡️ CZ: “Let's make crypto affordable in the US again.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5wcVV3NHptNkFJbUhEOXRnS09EekM0LXVLUTl3b3p2OUZFakMzNWhqZXBmaTd6dVM3NDZDYzVZN0t1N3ZpVk1pLUFSaS02UlF6cjlybDdrcjczZC1CclBBRXp0dng?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ CZ: “Let's make crypto affor…

item.title: Every crypto whitepaper for the last decade has warned about the oracle problem. Someone finally demonstrated it for $34,000 using a hair dryer. Polymarket settles Paris temperature bets on a single Météo France weather station at Charles de Gaulle. Louve - x.com

item.title: LATEST: 📈 Trump family-backed American Bitcoin bought 11,298 new miners, increasing its total owned capacity to 28.1 EH/s across 89,242 machines. - x.com

item.title: LONGITUDE recap: Adam Back on Satoshi, crypto regulation needs tweaks
item.description: Blockstream’s Adam Back discusses why people think he’s Satoshi Nakamoto, while the CEO of OKX Europe said MiCA is “extremely beneficial” for the industry at the latest LONGITUDE event in Paris.

item.title: Four reasons why the crypto market is rallying today: Will bulls maintain control?
item.description: Bitcoin and Ether surged as US liquidity measures and record spot ETF inflows offset investors’ recession fears and their concerns over the war in Iran.

item.title: Bitcoin chases monthly high above $80K as nearly all BTC price metrics turn bullish
item.description: Bitcoin moves closer to $80,000 as data shows traders positioning in futures markets. Will potential profit-taking in the $83,000 to $88,000 range put a cap on the rally?

item.title: Price predictions 4/22: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin rally above the $78,333 resistance signals sustained buying by the bulls, clearing the path for a potential rally to $84,000.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried pulls motion for a new trial, still asks for new judge
item.description: The ex-FTX CEO said he consulted with his parents and lawyers regarding a recent filing he sent from prison, but claimed to be the ”ultimate author of the documents.”

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: The President of the United States told me to buy crypto. I did not ask questions. Questions are for people who do not trust the President. I sold the truck the same afternoon. I have sent the phrase "few understand" to 1,400 people since then. Eleven bought in. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE43akFPTThPQTJTNXl5Y0J0Qm1SSUstR3pkcXlrSzQtbWJITHYtVGhUVUFkNXVWQjhQTU42SHA4Zm1XTW5pbnFoZ3dOZUE3THc2UGZWWDZZa1VPLUpVNGc?oc=5" target="_blank">The President of the United States told…

item.title: US Government Runs a Bitcoin Node, But Not Mining BTC: US Admiral
item.description: The commander of U.S. forces in the Pacific said the military is investigating Bitcoin’s ability to “secure and protect networks.”

item.title: OpenAI Launches Workspace Agents Feature in ChatGPT
item.description: Codex-powered tools automate reports, code, Slack replies, and other workplace tasks.

item.title: Who Satoshi is no longer matters for Bitcoin. That said, I agree this is the most thoughtful piece I’ve seen on the topic. It stands in contrast to prior self-indulgent exposés, approaching the topic with humility and kindness - qualities Satoshi and Bitcoin have earn - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE01czVmbmtQTWtfWW90VG5SLVRoUjRoN0lrUGpqOHV0d1VESDFyU01FXzVnRmZ5enptNmxGMWYzRDY2SDlUeEdsMlotbmppVUZqeDI3YXpVcnBRLVJ1?oc=5" target="_blank">Who Satoshi is no longer matters for Bitco…

item.title: Kalshi flags more insider trading cases, including politician who appeared on FBoy Island
item.description: The prediction market platform, which has been caught in the middle of a regulatory battle between the feds and the states, is seeking to demonstrate strong controls.

item.title: Kalshi Fines Meme Coin Candidate Mark Moran, Others for Betting on Their Own Elections
item.description: Moran, a candidate running for U.S. Senate in Virginia, previously described self-wagers as “free advertising.”

item.title: Xiaomi's New MiMo 2.5 Pro AI Can See, Hear, and Act—All in One Model
item.description: Five weeks after MiMo-V2-Pro stunned the AI world, Xiaomi is back with a model that adds eyes and ears—at half the price.

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla reports unchanged bitcoin holdings, books $173 million digital asset loss
item.description: The company's bitcoin stash remained at 11,509 BTC, worth about $880 million at bitcoin's current price of around $78,000.

item.title: AngelList's USVC Gives Investors Exposure to OpenAI, Anthropic and xAI—Starting at $500
item.description: AngelList's new USVC fund allows non-accredited retail investors to gain exposure to major private firms like Anthropic and OpenAI.
